title: Neon Wilderland Side Quest Frames
note: Short reconverging DtFrame-compatible chains. Terminal nodes omit next for Side quest complete → return to march. Ids: dt-sq-NN-###.

frames.title: Biolume Tithe
frames.body: The canopy bleeds green neon into the mud. Something in the pines meters your pulse like Helix meters spirit debt.

frames.title: Biolume Tithe: The Ask
frames.body: A dryad of fiber and sap steps from a trunk, hand out. Tithe: three drops brother-blood, or the chrome knife on your belt.

choices.label: Take it loud
choices.approach: Fists, chrome, and whatever the dog decides is prey.

choices.label: Take it quiet
choices.approach: Talk, trade, or sneak — until the quiet breaks.

frames.title: Biolume Tithe: Loud Answer
frames.body: You refuse with steel. The tree-line answers — a webling fat on neon sap, silk sticky with code-light.

frames.title: Biolume Tithe: Quiet Answer
frames.body: You cut a palm and drip. The dryad licks the air, not the blood, and marks a ford that was not there.

choices.label: Commit to the deal
choices.approach: Pay the price and walk out owing someone uglier.

choices.label: Double-cross mid-handshake
choices.approach: Smile, then make it a fight.

frames.title: Biolume Tithe: Handshake Breaks
frames.body: The spirit seals the bargain with a hum in your teeth. Trail opens. Debt logged somewhere older than Helix.

frames.title: Biolume Tithe: Side Quest Complete
frames.body: Sap vial cools in your pack, humming when anyone says a name too true. Pin goes cold. March waits. Side quest complete — return to the march.

frames.title: Chrome Knife Cache
frames.body: Fresh dirt under a fiber-vine oak. Someone buried inventory and forgot to kill the witnesses.

frames.title: Chrome Knife Cache: The Ask
frames.body: A scav crew circles the dig with plasma tips. Dig with them, or dig through them.

choices.label: Take it loud
choices.approach: Fists, chrome, and whatever the dog decides is prey.

choices.label: Take it quiet
choices.approach: Talk, trade, or sneak — until the quiet breaks.

frames.title: Chrome Knife Cache: Loud Answer
frames.body: Shovels become knives. A whip-hand leftover from some coffle job wants the crate alone.

frames.title: Chrome Knife Cache: Quiet Answer
frames.body: You trade a stim strip for first pick. They smile like thieves who plan a second tax.

choices.label: Commit to the deal
choices.approach: Pay the price and walk out owing someone uglier.

choices.label: Double-cross mid-handshake
choices.approach: Smile, then make it a fight.

frames.title: Chrome Knife Cache: Handshake Breaks
frames.body: Handshake turns into a grab for your pack. Quiet dies on schedule.

frames.title: Chrome Knife Cache: Side Quest Complete
frames.body: One chrome blade fits your palm like it was cast from an old callsign. The rest of the crate can rot. Side quest complete — return to the march.

frames.title: Wake-Glade Whisper
frames.body: Wake-glade dirt still smells like ozone and forgotten birthdays. The dog sits, staring at empty air.

frames.title: Wake-Glade Whisper: The Ask
frames.body: A whisper offers one syllable of a true name. Price: sleep tonight without dreaming — or fight the shade that owns the rest.

choices.label: Take it loud
choices.approach: Fists, chrome, and whatever the dog decides is prey.

choices.label: Take it quiet
choices.approach: Talk, trade, or sneak — until the quiet breaks.

frames.title: Wake-Glade Whisper: Loud Answer
frames.body: You spit on the offer. The shade wears your face wrong and comes in swinging.

frames.title: Wake-Glade Whisper: Quiet Answer
frames.body: You take the syllable. It burns under the tongue like a SKU waiting to hatch.

choices.label: Commit to the deal
choices.approach: Pay the price and walk out owing someone uglier.

choices.label: Double-cross mid-handshake
choices.approach: Smile, then make it a fight.

frames.title: Wake-Glade Whisper: Handshake Breaks
frames.body: The whisper wants a second payment mid-deal — your dog's name. You refuse with chrome.

frames.title: Wake-Glade Whisper: Side Quest Complete
frames.body: A scar itches when drones pass. One syllable lives in your mouth. Do not say it drunk. Side quest complete — return to the march.

frames.title: Stim Patch Peddlers
frames.body: Kids with barcode freckles hawk forget-patches off a busted drone sled. Their eyes are too steady.

frames.title: Stim Patch Peddlers: The Ask
frames.body: Buy a patch, smash the sled, or ask who taught children Project Pale slang.

choices.label: Take it loud
choices.approach: Fists, chrome, and whatever the dog decides is prey.

choices.label: Take it quiet
choices.approach: Talk, trade, or sneak — until the quiet breaks.

frames.title: Stim Patch Peddlers: Loud Answer
frames.body: You kick the sled. A thug in a kid's coat stands up with adult knuckles.

frames.title: Stim Patch Peddlers: Quiet Answer
frames.body: You buy one strip. The dog growls at your cheek like you smell like a stranger.

choices.label: Commit to the deal
choices.approach: Pay the price and walk out owing someone uglier.

choices.label: Double-cross mid-handshake
choices.approach: Smile, then make it a fight.

frames.title: Stim Patch Peddlers: Handshake Breaks
frames.body: They try to upsell a full wipe-lite. You end the sales pitch with a boot.

frames.title: Stim Patch Peddlers: Side Quest Complete
frames.body: Half-spent strip ticks in your pocket. Clarity on demand. Relapse on layaway. Side quest complete — return to the march.

frames.title: Widowmere Mirror
frames.body: Widowmere holds your reflection like a product photo. The eyes in the water blink first.

frames.title: Widowmere Mirror: The Ask
frames.body: Drink, smash the mirror-calm, or let the dog decide which face is prey.

choices.label: Take it loud
choices.approach: Fists, chrome, and whatever the dog decides is prey.

choices.label: Take it quiet
choices.approach: Talk, trade, or sneak — until the quiet breaks.

frames.title: Widowmere Mirror: Loud Answer
frames.body: You break the surface with a blade. A coffle-shade climbs out wearing wet iron.

frames.title: Widowmere Mirror: Quiet Answer
frames.body: You drink. Taste: someone else's overtime and a name that almost fits.

choices.label: Commit to the deal
choices.approach: Pay the price and walk out owing someone uglier.

choices.label: Double-cross mid-handshake
choices.approach: Smile, then make it a fight.

frames.title: Widowmere Mirror: Handshake Breaks
frames.body: The lake wants a second sip — brother blood. You offer chrome instead.

frames.title: Widowmere Mirror: Side Quest Complete
frames.body: Coolant shard fogs when you lie to the pack. Useful. Insulting. Keep it. Side quest complete — return to the march.

frames.title: Barcode Saplings
frames.body: Saplings stand in rows like a nursery for property. Each trunk already wears a SKU scar.

frames.title: Barcode Saplings: The Ask
frames.body: Burn the row, peel evidence, or wait for the planter who treats woods like warehouse.

choices.label: Take it loud
choices.approach: Fists, chrome, and whatever the dog decides is prey.

choices.label: Take it quiet
choices.approach: Talk, trade, or sneak — until the quiet breaks.

frames.title: Barcode Saplings: Loud Answer
frames.body: The planter arrives early — ash-wisp stalker on a Helix leash of smoke.

frames.title: Barcode Saplings: Quiet Answer
frames.body: You peel a barcode strip. The trees bleed green light and scream like radios.

choices.label: Commit to the deal
choices.approach: Pay the price and walk out owing someone uglier.

choices.label: Double-cross mid-handshake
choices.approach: Smile, then make it a fight.

frames.title: Barcode Saplings: Handshake Breaks
frames.body: A scav offers coin for the peel, then decides murder is cheaper.

frames.title: Barcode Saplings: Side Quest Complete
frames.body: Dead product code on bark. Someone catalogued a forest. You stole a receipt. Side quest complete — return to the march.

frames.title: Pack Dog's Dig
frames.body: The dog digs like the dirt owes him rent. Chrome jawbone. Fresh. Never buried by weather.

frames.title: Pack Dog's Dig: The Ask
frames.body: Keep the bone, rebury it, or follow the scent trail that smells like your own sweat.

choices.label: Take it loud
choices.approach: Fists, chrome, and whatever the dog decides is prey.

choices.label: Take it quiet
choices.approach: Talk, trade, or sneak — until the quiet breaks.

frames.title: Pack Dog's Dig: Loud Answer
frames.body: Owner comes on four legs and bad intentions — dust-trail warg with chrome in its gums.

frames.title: Pack Dog's Dig: Quiet Answer
frames.body: You rebury with respect. The ground spits the bone back like a rejected contract.

choices.label: Commit to the deal
choices.approach: Pay the price and walk out owing someone uglier.

choices.label: Double-cross mid-handshake
choices.approach: Smile, then make it a fight.

frames.title: Pack Dog's Dig: Handshake Breaks
frames.body: A camp thief tries to pocket the jaw while you pray. Prayer ends.

frames.title: Pack Dog's Dig: Side Quest Complete
frames.body: Chrome canine on wire. The dog approves. Your neck feels watched. Side quest complete — return to the march.

frames.title: Neon Dryad Bargain
frames.body: Fiber-optic hair hangs from a willow that should not grow here. It speaks in modem-hiss and old Elvish junk.

frames.title: Neon Dryad Bargain: The Ask
frames.body: Safe ford for blood, or force the crossing and drown the polite way.

choices.label: Take it loud
choices.approach: Fists, chrome, and whatever the dog decides is prey.

choices.label: Take it quiet
choices.approach: Talk, trade, or sneak — until the quiet breaks.

frames.title: Neon Dryad Bargain: Loud Answer
frames.body: You take the ford by force. River vermin and a webling share the toll booth.

frames.title: Neon Dryad Bargain: Quiet Answer
frames.body: Three drops. Three brothers. The ford hardens like glass under boot.

choices.label: Commit to the deal
choices.approach: Pay the price and walk out owing someone uglier.

choices.label: Double-cross mid-handshake
choices.approach: Smile, then make it a fight.

frames.title: Neon Dryad Bargain: Handshake Breaks
frames.body: Mid-crossing the dryad asks for a fourth drop — the dog's. You decline violently.

frames.title: Neon Dryad Bargain: Side Quest Complete
frames.body: Token of favor: one trail lie forgiven by the woods. Spend it before Helix does. Side quest complete — return to the march.

frames.title: Coffle Shade Detour
frames.body: Mist builds cages that do not cast shadows. Inside: the sound of numbers being counted.

frames.title: Coffle Shade Detour: The Ask
frames.body: Walk around, walk through, or let the dog piss on the ghost iron.

choices.label: Take it loud
choices.approach: Fists, chrome, and whatever the dog decides is prey.

choices.label: Take it quiet
choices.approach: Talk, trade, or sneak — until the quiet breaks.

frames.title: Coffle Shade Detour: Loud Answer
frames.body: Through means fight. Coffle-shade rattles empty manacles at your throat.

frames.title: Coffle Shade Detour: Quiet Answer
frames.body: Around means longer road and a whisper that calls you Nine-Mark anyway.

choices.label: Commit to the deal
choices.approach: Pay the price and walk out owing someone uglier.

choices.label: Double-cross mid-handshake
choices.approach: Smile, then make it a fight.

frames.title: Coffle Shade Detour: Handshake Breaks
frames.body: The whisper offers a shortcut for a stim. You take the shortcut's throat instead.

frames.title: Coffle Shade Detour: Side Quest Complete
frames.body: Cold iron flake cools rage. Pocket it for the night you want to burn a tower sober. Side quest complete — return to the march.

frames.title: Fiber-Vine Snare
frames.body: Living cable drops from oaks like hanging sentences. A scav screams mid-sentence.

frames.title: Fiber-Vine Snare: The Ask
frames.body: Cut him free, cut the vine for salvage, or wait and loot the quiet.

choices.label: Take it loud
choices.approach: Fists, chrome, and whatever the dog decides is prey.

choices.label: Take it quiet
choices.approach: Talk, trade, or sneak — until the quiet breaks.

frames.title: Fiber-Vine Snare: Loud Answer
frames.body: You cut. The vine fights like a snake paid in stock options. Thug on the winch end.

frames.title: Fiber-Vine Snare: Quiet Answer
frames.body: You wait. The scav dies. The vine offers you the same contract in green light.

choices.label: Commit to the deal
choices.approach: Pay the price and walk out owing someone uglier.

choices.label: Double-cross mid-handshake
choices.approach: Smile, then make it a fight.

frames.title: Fiber-Vine Snare: Handshake Breaks
frames.body: You fake acceptance, then garrote the winch-hand with his own cable.

frames.title: Fiber-Vine Snare: Side Quest Complete
frames.body: Coil of fiber-vine. Ties gear. Chokes informants. Smells like ozone guilt. Side quest complete — return to the march.

frames.title: Warrant Nail Auction
frames.body: Auction tent smells like ozone and bad coffee. Lot twelve is a sketch of three blank faces.

frames.title: Warrant Nail Auction: The Ask
frames.body: Bid with stolen coin, crash the auction, or brand the auctioneer with his own nail.

choices.label: Take it loud
choices.approach: Fists, chrome, and whatever the dog decides is prey.

choices.label: Take it quiet
choices.approach: Talk, trade, or sneak — until the quiet breaks.

frames.title: Warrant Nail Auction: Loud Answer
frames.body: Crash. Pale-host scout draws first. The crowd bets on blood instead of faces.

frames.title: Warrant Nail Auction: Quiet Answer
frames.body: You bid. Win a nail. Lose the anonymity you were pretending to have.

choices.label: Commit to the deal
choices.approach: Pay the price and walk out owing someone uglier.

choices.label: Double-cross mid-handshake
choices.approach: Smile, then make it a fight.

frames.title: Warrant Nail Auction: Handshake Breaks
frames.body: Seller tries a second sale — your dog as a tracking add-on. Transaction voided in teeth.

frames.title: Warrant Nail Auction: Side Quest Complete
frames.body: Bent warrant nail. One soft spoof. After that, you are inventory again. Side quest complete — return to the march.

frames.title: SKU Hunter Duel
frames.body: Two crews, one clearing, zero manners. You are the argument with a pulse.

frames.title: SKU Hunter Duel: The Ask
frames.body: Pick a crew, kill both ideas, or walk and become the chase.

choices.label: Take it loud
choices.approach: Fists, chrome, and whatever the dog decides is prey.

choices.label: Take it quiet
choices.approach: Talk, trade, or sneak — until the quiet breaks.

frames.title: SKU Hunter Duel: Loud Answer
frames.body: You refuse ownership. Red-maw hunter takes that personal.

frames.title: SKU Hunter Duel: Quiet Answer
frames.body: You pick a side. They smile like employers. Employers always invoice in blood later.

choices.label: Commit to the deal
choices.approach: Pay the price and walk out owing someone uglier.

choices.label: Double-cross mid-handshake
choices.approach: Smile, then make it a fight.

frames.title: SKU Hunter Duel: Handshake Breaks
frames.body: Your chosen crew sells you mid-handshake. Predicted. Punished.

frames.title: SKU Hunter Duel: Side Quest Complete
frames.body: Melted hunter badge. Scrap chrome with a serial that almost matches your scar. Side quest complete — return to the march.

frames.title: Palefen Coolant Sip
frames.body: Palefen Reservoir mirrors biolume pines and a sky that forgot stars. The dog will not drink.

frames.title: Palefen Coolant Sip: The Ask
frames.body: Sip the code, bottle it, or fight the mist-hounds that guard the thirst.

choices.label: Take it loud
choices.approach: Fists, chrome, and whatever the dog decides is prey.

choices.label: Take it quiet
choices.approach: Talk, trade, or sneak — until the quiet breaks.

frames.title: Palefen Coolant Sip: Loud Answer
frames.body: You bottle without asking. Grave-mist hound objects with lungs full of fog.

frames.title: Palefen Coolant Sip: Quiet Answer
frames.body: One sip. Taste: overtime, wetwork, a woman's laugh that is not yours.

choices.label: Commit to the deal
choices.approach: Pay the price and walk out owing someone uglier.

choices.label: Double-cross mid-handshake
choices.approach: Smile, then make it a fight.

frames.title: Palefen Coolant Sip: Handshake Breaks
frames.body: A pilgrim wants your flask for a hymn. Hymn ends when he draws.

frames.title: Palefen Coolant Sip: Side Quest Complete
frames.body: Flask steadies stim shakes. Dreams get louder. Fair trade in this country. Side quest complete — return to the march.

frames.title: Thornspine Ambush
frames.body: Tooth-black ridges. Crossbows click like insects. Someone already spent a bolt on your silhouette.

frames.title: Thornspine Ambush: The Ask
frames.body: Charge the ridge, negotiate under white flag, or send the dog as a rumor.

choices.label: Take it loud
choices.approach: Fists, chrome, and whatever the dog decides is prey.

choices.label: Take it quiet
choices.approach: Talk, trade, or sneak — until the quiet breaks.

frames.title: Thornspine Ambush: Loud Answer
frames.body: Charge. Ash-cloak outrider meets you in shale and bad poetry.

frames.title: Thornspine Ambush: Quiet Answer
frames.body: White flag. They want a finger as proof you are the lot. You offer a different finger — theirs.

choices.label: Commit to the deal
choices.approach: Pay the price and walk out owing someone uglier.

choices.label: Double-cross mid-handshake
choices.approach: Smile, then make it a fight.

frames.title: Thornspine Ambush: Handshake Breaks
frames.body: Talking ends when a second crew tags in. Ambush inside the ambush.

frames.title: Thornspine Ambush: Side Quest Complete
frames.body: One plasma bolt left. Spend it on something that deserves a hole. Side quest complete — return to the march.

frames.title: Stim Den Confession
frames.body: Den light is purple bruise. The priest wears a collar that used to meter spirits, now meters sins.

frames.title: Stim Den Confession: The Ask
frames.body: Confess for an ampule, rob the altar, or make him confess who taught him Pale slang.

choices.label: Take it loud
choices.approach: Fists, chrome, and whatever the dog decides is prey.

choices.label: Take it quiet
choices.approach: Talk, trade, or sneak — until the quiet breaks.

frames.title: Stim Den Confession: Loud Answer
frames.body: Rob the altar. Thorn-clan skirmisher was the usher. Bad usher.

frames.title: Stim Den Confession: Quiet Answer
frames.body: You confess a fake sin. He answers with a real Project Pale phrase. Skin crawls.

choices.label: Commit to the deal
choices.approach: Pay the price and walk out owing someone uglier.

choices.label: Double-cross mid-handshake
choices.approach: Smile, then make it a fight.

frames.title: Stim Den Confession: Handshake Breaks
frames.body: He offers PALE-LITE for a brother's true name. You offer violence.

frames.title: Stim Den Confession: Side Quest Complete
frames.body: Ampule labeled PALE-LITE. Illegal. Effective. Do not stack with conscience. Side quest complete — return to the march.

frames.title: Smuggler's Chrome Cut
frames.body: Chromeveil barge idles with cages that hum prayers backwards. Skipper's smile is a invoice.

frames.title: Smuggler's Chrome Cut: The Ask
frames.body: Guard the freight, dump it, or free whatever is rattling the spirit-bars.

choices.label: Take it loud
choices.approach: Fists, chrome, and whatever the dog decides is prey.

choices.label: Take it quiet
choices.approach: Talk, trade, or sneak — until the quiet breaks.

frames.title: Smuggler's Chrome Cut: Loud Answer
frames.body: Dump it. Bridge-brute hired as insurance disagrees with charity.

frames.title: Smuggler's Chrome Cut: Quiet Answer
frames.body: You guard. Coin is good. The humming gets into your fillings.

choices.label: Commit to the deal
choices.approach: Pay the price and walk out owing someone uglier.

choices.label: Double-cross mid-handshake
choices.approach: Smile, then make it a fight.

frames.title: Smuggler's Chrome Cut: Handshake Breaks
frames.body: Freehold inspectors board. Skipper points at you as the cargo. Classic.

frames.title: Smuggler's Chrome Cut: Side Quest Complete
frames.body: Chemical coin and an empty spirit jar. Emptiness still feels watched. Side quest complete — return to the march.

frames.title: Dragon-Cult Pamphlets
frames.body: Paper on a nail: BURN THE BARCODE, BECOME THE WEATHER. Blood already dried in the margins.

frames.title: Dragon-Cult Pamphlets: The Ask
frames.body: Join the circle, burn the pamphlets, or follow the ink to the recruiter's throat.

choices.label: Take it loud
choices.approach: Fists, chrome, and whatever the dog decides is prey.

choices.label: Take it quiet
choices.approach: Talk, trade, or sneak — until the quiet breaks.

frames.title: Dragon-Cult Pamphlets: Loud Answer
frames.body: Burn the paper. Recruiter was a pale-host scout moonlighting as prophet.

frames.title: Dragon-Cult Pamphlets: Quiet Answer
frames.body: You kneel for the sermon. They brand initiates with heated chrome. Almost you.

choices.label: Commit to the deal
choices.approach: Pay the price and walk out owing someone uglier.

choices.label: Double-cross mid-handshake
choices.approach: Smile, then make it a fight.

frames.title: Dragon-Cult Pamphlets: Handshake Breaks
frames.body: Initiation requires a brother's scream. You rewrite the liturgy.

frames.title: Dragon-Cult Pamphlets: Side Quest Complete
frames.body: Ink that glows under Helix neon. Propaganda that doubles as a blacklight. Side quest complete — return to the march.

frames.title: Crashed Scout Drone
frames.body: Smoking drone in a coolant creek. Lens still blinking like it is taking attendance.

frames.title: Crashed Scout Drone: The Ask
frames.body: Salvage, smash, or bait the recall pack into a killbox.

choices.label: Take it loud
choices.approach: Fists, chrome, and whatever the dog decides is prey.

choices.label: Take it quiet
choices.approach: Talk, trade, or sneak — until the quiet breaks.

frames.title: Crashed Scout Drone: Loud Answer
frames.body: Smash first. Recall pack arrives as red-maw hunters on a timer.

frames.title: Crashed Scout Drone: Quiet Answer
frames.body: You pocket the lens. It whispers coordinates in your palm — home that is not home.

choices.label: Commit to the deal
choices.approach: Pay the price and walk out owing someone uglier.

choices.label: Double-cross mid-handshake
choices.approach: Smile, then make it a fight.

frames.title: Crashed Scout Drone: Handshake Breaks
frames.body: A scav claims salvage rights with a plasma cutter. Negotiate in the old dialect.

frames.title: Crashed Scout Drone: Side Quest Complete
frames.body: Cracked lens shows heat ghosts at night. Including ones that look like you, older. Side quest complete — return to the march.

frames.title: Fist Prelims Under Reed
frames.body: Reeds hide a circle of mud and teeth. Synth drum keeps time. Betting chalk on thighs.

frames.title: Fist Prelims Under Reed: The Ask
frames.body: Fight a bout, fix a bout, or rob the bookie while the crowd screams.

choices.label: Take it loud
choices.approach: Fists, chrome, and whatever the dog decides is prey.

choices.label: Take it quiet
choices.approach: Talk, trade, or sneak — until the quiet breaks.

frames.title: Fist Prelims Under Reed: Loud Answer
frames.body: Bout. Opponent is a thorn-clan leftover who fights like rent is due in blood.

frames.title: Fist Prelims Under Reed: Quiet Answer
frames.body: You fix with the bookie. He smiles. Fixes always include a betrayal clause.

choices.label: Commit to the deal
choices.approach: Pay the price and walk out owing someone uglier.

choices.label: Double-cross mid-handshake
choices.approach: Smile, then make it a fight.

frames.title: Fist Prelims Under Reed: Handshake Breaks
frames.body: Betrayal clause activates. Bookie's muscle steps in smelling like reed rot.

frames.title: Fist Prelims Under Reed: Side Quest Complete
frames.body: Knuckle wrap stained with odds. Wear it when you need the pit to recognize you. Side quest complete — return to the march.

frames.title: Rememberer's Trail
frames.body: The Rememberer pulls east like a compass with teeth. Scent: you, plus gun oil, plus a woman's perfume.

frames.title: Rememberer's Trail: The Ask
frames.body: Follow, leash him, or let him choose which brother's scent is loudest.

choices.label: Take it loud
choices.approach: Fists, chrome, and whatever the dog decides is prey.

choices.label: Take it quiet
choices.approach: Talk, trade, or sneak — until the quiet breaks.

frames.title: Rememberer's Trail: Loud Answer
frames.body: Follow into an ambush of ash-cloak outriders who expected the old you.

frames.title: Rememberer's Trail: Quiet Answer
frames.body: You leash him. He looks at you like a stranger wearing his favorite jacket.

choices.label: Commit to the deal
choices.approach: Pay the price and walk out owing someone uglier.

choices.label: Double-cross mid-handshake
choices.approach: Smile, then make it a fight.

frames.title: Rememberer's Trail: Handshake Breaks
frames.body: Scent ends at a grave with your callsign misspelled. Grave robber objects to company.

frames.title: Rememberer's Trail: Side Quest Complete
frames.body: Fur sample that other dogs treat as pack. Proof the Rememberer is more than pet. Side quest complete — return to the march.

frames.title: Gate Smile Tax
frames.body: Helix Gate grins in pink neon: WELCOME / COMPLY / SMILE. Drones hover like polite vultures.

frames.title: Gate Smile Tax: The Ask
frames.body: Pay the smile-tax, forge a smile-chip, or walk the mire around and fight the fog instead.

choices.label: Take it loud
choices.approach: Fists, chrome, and whatever the dog decides is prey.

choices.label: Take it quiet
choices.approach: Talk, trade, or sneak — until the quiet breaks.

frames.title: Gate Smile Tax: Loud Answer
frames.body: Forge fails mid-scan. Citadel gate-brute comes to collect facial compliance.

frames.title: Gate Smile Tax: Quiet Answer
frames.body: You pay. Chip stamps your cheek warm. Feels like a collar without the honesty.

choices.label: Commit to the deal
choices.approach: Pay the price and walk out owing someone uglier.

choices.label: Double-cross mid-handshake
choices.approach: Smile, then make it a fight.

frames.title: Gate Smile Tax: Handshake Breaks
frames.body: Clerk upgrades your tax to a full seal inspection. You upgrade his day to pain.

frames.title: Gate Smile Tax: Side Quest Complete
frames.body: Counterfeit smile-chip. One soft checkpoint. After that, teeth. Side quest complete — return to the march.

frames.title: Blacksite Soft Entry
frames.body: Mirehollow stacks breathe green fog. A soft door in a hard wall blinks ACCESS DENIED like a dare.

frames.title: Blacksite Soft Entry: The Ask
frames.body: Card-skim, vent-crawl, or blow the seal and announce yourselves to every meter in range.

choices.label: Take it loud
choices.approach: Fists, chrome, and whatever the dog decides is prey.

choices.label: Take it quiet
choices.approach: Talk, trade, or sneak — until the quiet breaks.

frames.title: Blacksite Soft Entry: Loud Answer
frames.body: Blow the seal. Iron-cuff overseer was napping on stim waste dreams. Rude awakening.

frames.title: Blacksite Soft Entry: Quiet Answer
frames.body: Vent-crawl works until the vents scream. Something pale nests in the duct.

choices.label: Commit to the deal
choices.approach: Pay the price and walk out owing someone uglier.

choices.label: Double-cross mid-handshake
choices.approach: Smile, then make it a fight.

frames.title: Blacksite Soft Entry: Handshake Breaks
frames.body: Soft entry succeeds. Soft exit fails. Alarm tastes like copper and HR.

frames.title: Blacksite Soft Entry: Side Quest Complete
frames.body: Half-burned keycard, still warm. Opens one more door — or fries in your pocket. Side quest complete — return to the march.

frames.title: Neural Collar Yard
frames.body: Rings hang like wind chimes for the owned. One collar blinks unlocked. The dog snarls at empty air.

frames.title: Neural Collar Yard: The Ask
frames.body: Take the collar, smash the yard meters, or wait for whoever set the bait.

choices.label: Take it loud
choices.approach: Fists, chrome, and whatever the dog decides is prey.

choices.label: Take it quiet
choices.approach: Talk, trade, or sneak — until the quiet breaks.

frames.title: Neural Collar Yard: Loud Answer
frames.body: Smash. Bond-chain enforcer was the caretaker. He liked the chimes.

frames.title: Neural Collar Yard: Quiet Answer
frames.body: You take the unlocked collar. It clicks toward your throat like a homesick eel.

choices.label: Commit to the deal
choices.approach: Pay the price and walk out owing someone uglier.

choices.label: Double-cross mid-handshake
choices.approach: Smile, then make it a fight.

frames.title: Neural Collar Yard: Handshake Breaks
frames.body: Bait spring. Trap crew wants live blanks for the numbered beds.

frames.title: Neural Collar Yard: Side Quest Complete
frames.body: Dead collar ring. Bluffs a seal-guard once if you act like furniture. Side quest complete — return to the march.

frames.title: Guest Suite Mirror
frames.body: Guest suite smells like citrus and sedation. The mirror does not wait for you to look — it looks first.

frames.title: Guest Suite Mirror: The Ask
frames.body: Study the wetwork face, smash the glass, or ask the suite AI who paid for the reflection.

choices.label: Take it loud
choices.approach: Fists, chrome, and whatever the dog decides is prey.

choices.label: Take it quiet
choices.approach: Talk, trade, or sneak — until the quiet breaks.

frames.title: Guest Suite Mirror: Loud Answer
frames.body: Smash. Cold-iron haunt pours out of the silver like mercury with a grudge.

frames.title: Guest Suite Mirror: Quiet Answer
frames.body: You study. Muscle memory salutes. Stomach turns. The face knows how you kill.

choices.label: Commit to the deal
choices.approach: Pay the price and walk out owing someone uglier.

choices.label: Double-cross mid-handshake
choices.approach: Smile, then make it a fight.

frames.title: Guest Suite Mirror: Handshake Breaks
frames.body: AI offers a full identity restore for a brother's consent. Consent is not for sale.

frames.title: Guest Suite Mirror: Side Quest Complete
frames.body: Shard clouds when you lie to brothers. Bathroom honesty, trail edition. Side quest complete — return to the march.

frames.title: Mirehollow Stack Raid
frames.body: Stack stumps like broken teeth. Fog at knee height. Scav bells ring wrong notes.

frames.title: Mirehollow Stack Raid: The Ask
frames.body: Raid with scavs, raid alone, or broker peace between chrome and spirit — briefly.

choices.label: Take it loud
choices.approach: Fists, chrome, and whatever the dog decides is prey.

choices.label: Take it quiet
choices.approach: Talk, trade, or sneak — until the quiet breaks.

frames.title: Mirehollow Stack Raid: Loud Answer
frames.body: Alone. Gloomwood spinner drops from a stack lip, silk tasting of coolant.

frames.title: Mirehollow Stack Raid: Quiet Answer
frames.body: Broker. Both sides agree you are the fee. Predicted. Corrected.

choices.label: Commit to the deal
choices.approach: Pay the price and walk out owing someone uglier.

choices.label: Double-cross mid-handshake
choices.approach: Smile, then make it a fight.

frames.title: Mirehollow Stack Raid: Handshake Breaks
frames.body: Peace lasts eleven seconds. Twelfth second is a fight.

frames.title: Mirehollow Stack Raid: Side Quest Complete
frames.body: Green fog ampule. Cameras go snowblind. Lungs hate you. Worth it. Side quest complete — return to the march.

frames.title: Director's Leftover Memo
frames.body: Trash chute behind Helix Gate coughs a slate. Header: PALE CELL ROTATION — EYES ONLY.

frames.title: Director's Leftover Memo: The Ask
frames.body: Read, burn, or sell to freehold brokers who pay in stim and regret.

choices.label: Take it loud
choices.approach: Fists, chrome, and whatever the dog decides is prey.

choices.label: Take it quiet
choices.approach: Talk, trade, or sneak — until the quiet breaks.

frames.title: Director's Leftover Memo: Loud Answer
frames.body: Read aloud. Hunter ping hits like a migraine. Pale-host leftovers triangulate.

frames.title: Director's Leftover Memo: Quiet Answer
frames.body: You burn unread. Ash forms letters anyway. The woods learns faster than fire.

choices.label: Commit to the deal
choices.approach: Pay the price and walk out owing someone uglier.

choices.label: Double-cross mid-handshake
choices.approach: Smile, then make it a fight.

frames.title: Director's Leftover Memo: Handshake Breaks
frames.body: Broker pays, then sells your face to the next bidder before you leave the alley.

frames.title: Director's Leftover Memo: Side Quest Complete
frames.body: Memo fragment: three callsigns that might be yours. Saying them feels like loading a gun. Side quest complete — return to the march.

frames.title: Spirit Meter Calibration
frames.body: Techs in white coats feed biolume spirits into glass meters. The spirits scream in sine waves.

frames.title: Spirit Meter Calibration: The Ask
frames.body: Sabotage the calibration, free a spirit, or sell the meter schematics to scavs.

choices.label: Take it loud
choices.approach: Fists, chrome, and whatever the dog decides is prey.

choices.label: Take it quiet
choices.approach: Talk, trade, or sneak — until the quiet breaks.

frames.title: Spirit Meter Calibration: Loud Answer
frames.body: Sabotage. Pale-ember moths boil out of a cracked meter hungry for heat.

frames.title: Spirit Meter Calibration: Quiet Answer
frames.body: You free one spirit. It thanks you by biting a name into your forearm.

choices.label: Commit to the deal
choices.approach: Pay the price and walk out owing someone uglier.

choices.label: Double-cross mid-handshake
choices.approach: Smile, then make it a fight.

frames.title: Spirit Meter Calibration: Handshake Breaks
frames.body: Techs offer hush money. Hush money comes with a collar in the briefcase.

frames.title: Spirit Meter Calibration: Side Quest Complete
frames.body: Dial that reads spirit debt in air. Points at brothers when the night is honest. Side quest complete — return to the march.

frames.title: Reedfen Body Drop
frames.body: Reedfen coughs up bodies with your unit ink. Fresh enough to steam. Dog goes rigid.

frames.title: Reedfen Body Drop: The Ask
frames.body: Harvest a tattoo scrap, burn the drop site, or hunt whoever is staging your obituaries.

choices.label: Take it loud
choices.approach: Fists, chrome, and whatever the dog decides is prey.

choices.label: Take it quiet

frames.title: Reedfen Body Drop: Loud Answer
frames.body: Hunt. Bond-chain enforcer was planting evidence like seeds.

frames.title: Reedfen Body Drop: Quiet Answer
frames.body: You take a scrap. Ink still wet. It tries to crawl onto your skin.

choices.label: Commit to the deal
choices.approach: Pay the price and walk out owing someone uglier.

choices.label: Double-cross mid-handshake
choices.approach: Smile, then make it a fight.

frames.title: Reedfen Body Drop: Handshake Breaks
frames.body: A "rescuer" offers to hide the dog. Offer declined with prejudice.

frames.title: Reedfen Body Drop: Side Quest Complete
frames.body: Tattoo scrap in waterproof sleeve. Proof you were inventory with a team logo. Side quest complete — return to the march.

frames.title: Seal Kitchen Brawl
frames.body: House of Seals kitchen: steam, blood, and a union dispute settled in meat cuts.

frames.title: Seal Kitchen Brawl: The Ask
frames.body: Pick a side, steal the night's stim ration, or turn the brawl into a kitchen fire.

frames.title: Seal Kitchen Brawl: Loud Answer
frames.body: Pick wrong side on purpose. Iron-cuff overseer moonlights as head chef. Of course.

frames.title: Seal Kitchen Brawl: Quiet Answer
frames.body: Steal ration. Almost clean. Dishwasher has a shock baton and opinions.

choices.label: Commit to the deal

choices.label: Double-cross mid-handshake
choices.approach: Smile, then make it a fight.

frames.title: Seal Kitchen Brawl: Handshake Breaks
frames.body: Both sides pause to jump the outsiders. Kitchen democracy.

frames.title: Seal Kitchen Brawl: Side Quest Complete
frames.body: Cleaver that cooks and kills. Season with ash. Serve cold. Side quest complete — return to the march.

frames.title: Coldgate Uplink Sabotage
frames.body: Coldgate Uplink hums in the notch like a prayer to machinery. Drones drink from it.

frames.title: Coldgate Uplink Sabotage: The Ask
frames.body: Cut the fuse, reverse the feed, or leave a virus that smiles back at Helix.

choices.label: Take it loud
choices.approach: Fists, chrome, and whatever the dog decides is prey.

choices.label: Take it quiet
choices.approach: Talk, trade, or sneak — until the quiet breaks.

frames.title: Coldgate Uplink Sabotage: Loud Answer
frames.body: Cut. Citadel gate-brute was the mountain's night watch. Loud mountain.

frames.title: Coldgate Uplink Sabotage: Quiet Answer
frames.body: Virus planted. Uplink coughs. Somewhere a neon smile flickers.

choices.label: Commit to the deal
choices.approach: Pay the price and walk out owing someone uglier.

choices.label: Double-cross mid-handshake
choices.approach: Smile, then make it a fight.

frames.title: Coldgate Uplink Sabotage: Handshake Breaks
frames.body: Helix remote-locks the notch. Exit becomes a fight in thin air.

frames.title: Coldgate Uplink Sabotage: Side Quest Complete
frames.body: Uplink fuse. Throw it into a swarm and watch polite machines become weather. Side quest complete — return to the march.

frames.title: Undervault Open Mic
frames.body: Undervault stage light is the color of old bruises. Crowd laughs like they owe blood for the joke.

frames.title: Undervault Open Mic: The Ask
frames.body: Heckle the name-seller, fight the bout that follows, or buy a name and refuse to say it.

choices.label: Take it loud

choices.label: Take it quiet
choices.approach: Talk, trade, or sneak — until the quiet breaks.

frames.title: Undervault Open Mic: Loud Answer
frames.body: Heckle. Bone-drum captain is tonight's bouncer. Comedy dies screaming.

frames.title: Undervault Open Mic: Quiet Answer
frames.body: You buy a name. It is almost yours. Saying it would complete a Helix form.

choices.label: Commit to the deal
choices.approach: Pay the price and walk out owing someone uglier.

choices.label: Double-cross mid-handshake
choices.approach: Smile, then make it a fight.

frames.body: Comedian's handlers want the rest of the syllables from your throat.

frames.title: Undervault Open Mic: Side Quest Complete
frames.body: Mandolin string hums fight tempo into your pulse. Undervault souvenir. Keep it off your neck. Side quest complete — return to the march.

frames.title: Bone Mandolin Bout
frames.body: Booked. Odds board shows three silhouettes priced as one weapon. The dog is not listed. Insult.

frames.title: Bone Mandolin Bout: The Ask
frames.body: Fight clean, fight dirty, or throw the second round and rob the betting cage.

choices.label: Take it loud

choices.label: Take it quiet

frames.title: Bone Mandolin Bout: Loud Answer
frames.body: Clean is a lie. Warcamp berserker eats clean for breakfast.

frames.title: Bone Mandolin Bout: Quiet Answer
frames.body: You throw round two. Cage man smiles like he invented betrayal.

choices.label: Commit to the deal
choices.approach: Pay the price and walk out owing someone uglier.

choices.label: Double-cross mid-handshake
choices.approach: Smile, then make it a fight.

frames.title: Bone Mandolin Bout: Handshake Breaks
frames.body: Robbing the cage requires surviving the berserker who noticed the limp.

frames.title: Bone Mandolin Bout: Side Quest Complete
frames.body: Purse heavy. Tooth souvenir lighter. Crowd chants a callsign you did not give them. Side quest complete — return to the march.

frames.title: Project Pale Echo
frames.body: Abandoned briefing booth in Spirefall ash. Play button glows like a guilty conscience.

frames.title: Project Pale Echo: The Ask
frames.body: Play full, play mute with subtitles, or smash before the voice finishes owning you.

frames.title: Project Pale Echo: Loud Answer

frames.title: Project Pale Echo: Quiet Answer
frames.body: Play. Voice teaches a kill sequence your hands already know. Stomach leaves the room.

choices.label: Commit to the deal

frames.title: Project Pale Echo: Handshake Breaks
frames.body: Booth locks. Completion certificate prints with your blood type. Fight the printer's guards.

frames.title: Project Pale Echo: Side Quest Complete
frames.body: Chip the dog hears clean. He looks at you like the briefing named him too. Side quest complete — return to the march.

frames.title: Spirefall Loot Run
frames.body: Spirefall Fields: warehouses cough fire. Scavs sprint like the apocalypse is a clearance sale.

frames.title: Spirefall Loot Run: The Ask
frames.body: Loot with a crew, loot alone, or torch the warehouse so nobody eats Helix leftovers.

choices.label: Take it loud

choices.label: Take it quiet

frames.title: Spirefall Loot Run: Quiet Answer
frames.body: Crew up. Split is fair until the fire makes math emotional.

choices.label: Commit to the deal
choices.approach: Pay the price and walk out owing someone uglier.

choices.approach: Smile, then make it a fight.

frames.title: Spirefall Loot Run: Side Quest Complete
frames.body: Half-melted crate: stims and wire. Smells like victory and plastic cancer. Side quest complete — return to the march.

frames.title: Dragon Weather Prayer
frames.body: Ash rain clicks on chrome prayer beads. Cultists chant for a dragon welded from scrap and myth.

frames.title: Dragon Weather Prayer: The Ask
frames.body: Join the prayer, interrupt with steel, or claim you have seen the dragon and sell the lie.

choices.label: Take it loud

frames.title: Dragon Weather Prayer: Quiet Answer
frames.body: You sell the lie. They pay in beads. Then ask you to bleed proof.

frames.title: Identity Burn Party
frames.body: Bonfire of warrants and smile-chips. Music too happy for the corpses at the edge.

frames.title: Identity Burn Party: The Ask
frames.body: Burn your scrap, free the Helix meat, or ask who invited a live collar to a freedom party.

frames.body: Westwind Freeholds: auction block, moral fog. Defector smiles like a man who sold weather.

frames.title: Freehold Betrayal Bid: The Ask
frames.body: Buy him, kill him, or make him finish the sentence about Project Pale in public.

frames.title: Ash Horizon Duel
frames.body: Three silhouettes on the ash line wear your posture. Helix recycled the look. Not the soul — allegedly.

frames.title: Ash Horizon Duel: The Ask
frames.body: Duel their Anchor, duel all three, or refuse and let them hunt you into legend.

frames.body: Under-Spire velvet and blood. Vale's private pit: invite-only, morality optional, cameras everywhere.

frames.title: Vale's Private Pit: The Ask

frames.title: Three Names Returned
frames.body: Ash wind. A spirit holds a frost slate like a menu. Three names. Your mouths water. Your dog whines.

frames.title: Three Names Returned: The Ask
frames.body: Read silent, speak one, or smash the slate and keep being nobody.

frames.title: Last Stim Before Dawn
frames.body: Last den before Ash Horizon proper. Neon sign half-dead: REMEMBER / FORGET / PAY.

frames.title: Last Stim Before Dawn: The Ask
frames.body: Take the hit, smash the den, or make the dealer confess who still ships PALE-LITE west.

frames.body: Hit. Dream: the wipe room, three tables, one dog barking outside a door that should not exist.
